message:
fix(scripts,web): six more bugs from deep audit round 3

1. acfs.zshrc: stop aliasing find→fd — fd has completely incompatible
   syntax. Instead, alias fd↔fdfind so both names work

2. acfs.zshrc: FZF_DISABLE_KEYBINDINGS → DISABLE_FZF_KEY_BINDINGS
   (correct variable name so fzf keybindings are actually disabled)

3. zsh.sh: remove duplicate .zshrc.local sourcing from ~/.zshrc loader
   (acfs.zshrc already sources it, causing double execution)

4. install.sh: install_asset() add mkdir -p for destination directory
   (matches install_asset_from_path behavior, fixes partial installs)

5. install.sh: add missing local to VERSION_MAJOR in ensure_ubuntu()

6. analytics.ts: use getElapsedSecondsSince() in lesson funnel tracking
   to avoid NaN from corrupt localStorage timestamps

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2100,6 +2100,21 @@ install_asset() {
         return 1
     fi
 
+    # Ensure destination directory exists (matches install_asset_from_path behavior)
+    local _ia_dest_dir
+    _ia_dest_dir="$(dirname "$dest_path")"
+    if [[ ! -d "$_ia_dest_dir" ]]; then
+        local _ia_sudo="${SUDO:-}"
+        if [[ -z "$_ia_sudo" ]] && [[ $EUID -ne 0 ]] && command -v sudo &>/dev/null; then
+            _ia_sudo="sudo"
+        fi
+        if [[ -w "$(dirname "$_ia_dest_dir" 2>/dev/null)" ]] || [[ $EUID -eq 0 ]]; then
+            mkdir -p "$_ia_dest_dir" 2>/dev/null || true
+        elif [[ -n "$_ia_sudo" ]]; then
+            $_ia_sudo mkdir -p "$_ia_dest_dir" 2>/dev/null || true
+        fi
+    fi
+
     # If running with elevated privileges, refuse to write through symlink path
     # components for sensitive destinations (prevents symlink clobber attacks).
     if [[ $EUID -eq 0 ]]; then
@@ -2914,7 +2929,7 @@ ensure_ubuntu() {
         log_fatal "Cannot detect Ubuntu version (VERSION_ID missing)"
     fi
 
-    VERSION_MAJOR="${version_id%%.*}"
+    local VERSION_MAJOR="${version_id%%.*}"
     if [[ "$VERSION_MAJOR" -lt 22 ]]; then
         log_fatal "Unsupported Ubuntu version: ${version_id}. ACFS supports Ubuntu 22.04+ only."
     fi
